Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Albedon Pegarthus]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 26''' — Albedon Pegarthus is the current Champion of the Prime Arena.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 26''' — Albedon Pegarthus is the nephew of an influential Senator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 27''' — Albedon Pegarthus is a fighter representing Senator Pegarthus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 27''' — Albedon Pegarthus has white hair and a red scalp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 27''' — Albedon Pegarthus uses the Eraser Blade Combat Art.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 27''' — Albedon Pegarthus uses an orange force-blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 29''' — Albedon uses a large force-blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 30''' — Albedon is a fighter who made a mistake.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
